evaluation.question: Can you guide me on how to open the document 'sustainability_report.txt' from my computer and then insert the image 'power.png' at the end of the Executive Summary section?
evaluation.answer:
1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Open Document icon
3. Click the 'Choose File' button to select a file
4. Select the file called 'sustainability_report.txt' from your computer
5. Click the 'Open Document' button
6. Click the 'Insert' section
7. Click the Insert Image icon
8. Click the 'Choose File' button
9. Select the image file 'power.png' from your computer
10. Choose the image size (Small, Medium, Large) as desired
11. Move the cursor to the end of the Executive Summary section
12. Click 'Insert Image' button to add it to your document

evaluation.question: How can I create a new blank document and then check the character count of the empty document?
evaluation.answer:
1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the New Document icon
3. Choose the 'Blank Document' as the document type
4. Change the 'Document Title' if desired (default is 'Untitled Document')
5. Click the 'Create Document' button to create the new document
6. Click the 'Tools' section
7. Click the Character Count icon
8. Click the 'Show Character Count' button to display the character count of the empty document

evaluation.question: How can I open the document 'sustainability_report.txt' from my computer and then directly copy the 'Executive Summary' section without formatting?
evaluation.answer:
1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the Open Document icon
3. Click the 'Choose File' button to select a file
4. Select the file named 'sustainability_report.txt' from your computer
5. Click the 'Open Document' button
6. Click the 'Edit' section
7. Click the Copy icon
8. Click the Direct Copy icon under the Copy icon to reveal the submenu
9. Select the 'Executive Summary' section: 'Lumos Energy advanced toward net-zero with innovation, transparency, and community partnerships—cutting operational emissions 24%, investing $80M in renewables, and reaching a 40% recycling rate for industrial byproducts.'
10. Click the 'Copy Plain Text' icon to copy the text without formatting to the clipboard

evaluation.question: How can I open the document 'sustainability_report.txt' from my computer and perform a spell check to correct any spelling errors?

2. Click the Open Document icon

4. Select the file named 'sustainability_report.txt' from your computer
5. Click the 'Open Document' button
6. Click the 'Tools' section
7. Click the Spell Check icon
8. Click the 'Start Check' button, the system will scan for spelling errors
9. Choose the correct spelling from the suggestions or click the 'Ignore' button to ignore the word

evaluation.question: How can I insert a resume template from the Template Library and then perform a spell check on it to ensure there are no spelling errors?
evaluation.answer:
1. Click the 'Insert' section
2. Click the Template Library icon
3. Click a template from the template library, such as 'Resume', to insert it into your document
4. Click the 'Tools' section
5. Click the Spell Check icon
6. Click the 'Start Check' button to begin scanning the document for spelling errors
7. Review the suggestions provided for any spelling errors found and choose the correct spelling or click 'Ignore' to bypass any suggestions

evaluation.question: How can I create a new blank document and add a high-priority comment 'Review this section' to the first sentence?
evaluation.answer:
1. Click the 'File' section
2. Click the New Document icon
3. Choose 'Blank Document' as the 'Document Type'
4. Change the 'Document Title' to your desired title or leave it as 'Untitled Document'
5. Click the 'Create Document' button
6. Click the 'Tools' section
7. Click the New Comment icon
8. Input 'Review this section' in the comment content field
9. Input your name in the comment author field
10. Select 'High Priority' from the comment priority field
11. Select the first sentence in the document with the cursor
12. Click 'Add Comment to Selected Text' button to save the comment
13. Click the selected text in the document to view the added comment

evaluation.question: How can I create a new blank document and then right-align the first paragraph in this document?
evaluation.answer:

9. Click the 'Apply Right Align' button to align the text to the right

evaluation.question: How can I insert a 'Report' template from the Template Library and then convert the first paragraph into a bulleted list?
evaluation.answer:

2. Click the Template Library icon.

evaluation.question: How can I create a new blank document and insert a basic equation like 'E=mc^2' into it?

evaluation.question: How can I create a new blank document and then apply bold formatting to the title 'Project Overview' at the top of the document?

evaluation.question: How can I create a new blank document and then display the ruler to adjust margins in MiniWord?

5. Click the 'Create Document' button to create the new document

evaluation.question: How can I create a new document and then set the default font to Arial with a font size of 14px?

evaluation.question: Can you guide me on how to open the document 'sustainability_report.txt' from my computer and insert a hyperlink to 'https://www.lumosenergy.com' with the display text 'Lumos Energy' at the end of the Executive Summary section?
